SOURCE: 
Medicare Advantage Organizations (MAOs) 
FILE(S): 
IP revenue 
SNF revenue 
HH revenue 
OP revenue 
VALUES: 
0–XXXXXX 
COMMENT: 
When revenue center code = “0022” (SNF PPS) the unit count reflects the number of covered days for 
each HIPPS code and, if applicable, the number of visits for each rehab therapy code.
